home.title: EasyAppIntake
home.intro: Conversation-powered intake with structured data, validation, and handoff to your systems.
home.signedInBlurb: Use the dashboard for funnel health, handoff reliability, and operational KPIs across channels.

dashboard.title: Operations dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Industry-agnostic view of intake, verification, completion, and transfer to your destinations — comparable across organizations and channels.
dashboard.demoDataNote: Sample metrics for layout only. Connect your analytics API when ready.

funnel.intakeDesc: Capture requests from voice, messaging, or partner events.
funnel.validateDesc: Confirm identity, eligibility, consent, and data quality rules.
funnel.closeDesc: Finalize agreement and payment or equivalent settlement step for your workflow.
funnel.transferDesc: Deliver structured records to CRM, case tools, webhooks, or warehouses.

kpis.channelMixValue: Voice {voice, number}% · Messaging {messaging, number}% · Partner {partner, number}%

queue.title: Intake queue
queue.filterPlaceholder: Filter by session, status, vertical, or package…

session.title: Session
session.hitlPlaceholder: Approval actions will connect to the engine when available.
session.noVoiceChannel: No active voice leg for this session.
session.openLiveCallConfigure: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_HTML_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to your apps/api origin (e.g. Railway) to enable the live call link.

voiceBridge.title: Voice agent console
voiceBridge.description: Open the realtime agent UI hosted on the intake API. Your browser tab will receive a fresh WebSocket token from this app.
voiceBridge.configureHint: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_HTML_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (e.g. your Railway API origin) so the voice console link resolves.
voiceBridge.errorUnauthorized: You must be signed in to open the voice console.
voiceBridge.errorGeneric: Could not issue a token. Try again.
voiceBridge.errorConfigure: Could not build the agent URL. Check your environment variables.

live.title: Live Demo
live.subtitle: Share this screen while on a voice intake: connect to a Call SID, watch transcript and fields update from the engine.
live.agentInstructionHint: The Product / Form dropdown sets which fields load in Application fields (live).
live.errorCallSid: Enter a Call SID (or pick one from recent Twilio calls).
live.errorApiBase: Configure NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL so the browser can open a WebSocket to the API.
live.errorToken: Could not get a WebSocket token. Sign in and ensure API_JWT_SECRET matches the API.
live.errorWs: WebSocket error. Check Call SID, token, and API URL.
live.twilioLoadError: Could not load Twilio calls (check API route and credentials).
live.twilioEmpty: No calls yet — place a test call or refresh after dialing.
live.transcriptEmpty: Transcript appears after you connect and speech is processed.
live.applicationPanelHint: Values update as the transcript is processed while you are connected.
live.callEndedHint: Call ended — reconnect if you continue on a new leg.
live.applicantLinkHint: Share this link with the applicant to complete their application.
live.agentAdviceEmpty: No missing fields for the current Product / Form selection.
